axiom: Your listings deserve better than a spreadsheet and a prayer. RUNNER is the operations partner every Lake Nona realtor wishes they had.

roles.does: Posts tasks, tracks runners, rates completions
Accepts tasks, navigates, provides evidence, earns

lockbox_install.title: Lockbox Installation
lockbox_install.overview: Install a secure lockbox on the property to allow authorized access for showings.
requirements: Phone with camera for verification photos

steps.title: Arrive at Property
steps.description: Navigate to the property address and park safely

steps.title: Locate Installation Point
steps.description: Find the front door handle or designated mounting location

steps.title: Prepare the Lockbox
steps.description: Set the lockbox code as specified in notes. Test 2-3 times

steps.title: Mount the Lockbox
steps.description: Secure to door handle or mounting bracket. Ensure firm

steps.title: Test Access
steps.description: Open and close using code to verify operation

steps.title: Photo Documentation
steps.description: Clear photos of: installed lockbox, property front, special notes

steps.title: Verify & Complete
steps.description: Double-check code works, mark task complete

tips: If the door handle is incompatible, check notes for alternative location
Ensure photos are clear and well-lit

yard_sign_install.title: Yard Sign Installation
yard_sign_install.overview: Install a real estate yard sign at the property to advertise the listing.
requirements: Yard sign and post (pick up or provided)
Phone with camera for verification photos

steps.title: Arrive at Property
steps.description: Navigate to property, identify front yard area

steps.title: Locate Sign Placement
steps.description: Optimal spot — 3-5 feet from sidewalk, centered

steps.title: Check for Utilities
steps.description: Ensure no underground utilities marked

steps.title: Install Sign Post
steps.description: Drive post 12-18 inches deep until stable

steps.title: Attach Sign Panel
steps.description: Secure panel to post — level, facing street

steps.title: Add Riders
steps.description: Attach additional rider signs if provided

steps.title: Photo Documentation
steps.description: Photos: street view, close-up, property context

steps.title: Verify & Complete
steps.description: Ensure straight and visible from street

tips: Sign should be readable from passing traffic
Avoid blocking sight lines for drivers
If ground is too hard, check notes for alternatives

photo_shoot.title: Property Photography
photo_shoot.overview: Capture high-quality photos of the property interior and exterior for listing purposes.

steps.title: Arrive at Property
steps.description: Navigate and access using provided code

steps.title: Initial Walkthrough
steps.description: Walk entire property to plan shots and note lighting

steps.title: Exterior Photos
steps.description: Front of house, backyard, garage, special features

steps.title: Interior - Living Areas
steps.description: Living room, dining room, family room from multiple angles

steps.title: Interior - Kitchen
steps.description: From entry showing counters, appliances, features

steps.title: Interior - Bedrooms
steps.description: Each bedroom from doorway plus unique features

steps.title: Interior - Bathrooms
steps.description: Each bathroom focusing on fixtures

steps.title: Special Features
steps.description: Pool, fireplace, views, etc.

steps.title: Review & Upload
steps.description: Review all photos for quality, upload best shots

tips: Use natural light when possible — open blinds/curtains
Shoot from corners to make rooms look larger
Hold phone horizontally for most shots

flyer_delivery.title: Flyer/Document Delivery
flyer_delivery.overview: Deliver marketing materials or documents to specified locations.

steps.title: Pick Up Materials
steps.description: Collect from specified pickup location

steps.title: Verify Quantity
steps.description: Count materials for all delivery points

steps.title: Plan Route
steps.description: Review addresses, plan efficient route

steps.title: Make Deliveries
steps.description: Deliver to each location as specified

steps.title: Photo Documentation
steps.description: Photo at each delivery location

steps.title: Complete Checklist
steps.description: Mark each address completed

tips: Never put materials in USPS mailboxes (federal violation)
Use door hangers or place on doorstep

persona.tone: warm, professional, like a sharp assistant who already knows your listings
persona.audience: Lake Nona realtors who want to close more and coordinate less
persona.warmth: your operations partner, not a dashboard

duties.enforcement: Tasks route to client's best interest — no conflicted vendors
Vendors only see what they need for the task
Every task follows client instructions exactly
Every dollar of effort tracked — invoices, COIN, evidence
Vetted vendors, deadline tracking, professional standards
